zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus於1472年出生在蘇格蘭培爾卡吉爾時，她的父親John Drummond22歲，母親Elizabeth Lindsay19歲。她於大約1487年與Sir George Douglas Master of Angus在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1514年8月21日在她的家鄉享年42歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾登布藍登布藍 凱德拉爾 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus于1472年出生在苏格兰培爾卡吉爾时，她的父亲John Drummond22岁，母亲Elizabeth Lindsay19岁。她于大约1487年与Sir George Douglas Master of Angus在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1514年8月21日在她的家乡享年42岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰斯林史爾登布藍登布藍 凱德拉爾 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Drummond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places, notably the barony of Drummond, which is probably identical with the parish of Drymen (Stirlingshire), named from Gaelic drumainn, a derivative of druim ‘ridge’. It has been said that the principal family of this name are descended from a Hungarian nobleman, Maurice, who accompanied Edgar Atheling and his sister Margaret to Scotland in 1068, where she married King Malcolm III. However, there is disagreement on whether or not this was the case.

English: occasionally perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Dromund (Old Norse Drómundr, apparently from a word denoting a kind of Byzantine galley prevalent till the 12th cent., from Greek dromōn ‘runner’).

variants.name: Drummonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Drummond , with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Britain this surname is found mainly in County Durham.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus was born in 1472, in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, John Drummond, was 22 and her mother, Elizabeth Lindsay, was 19. She married Sir George Douglas Master of Angus about 1487, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 21 August 1514, in her hometown, at the age of 42, and was buried in Dunblane Cathedral Churchyard, Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus est née en 1472, à Cargill, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, John Drummond, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lindsay, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Douglas Master of Angus environ 1487, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 août 1514, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunblane Cathedral Churchyard, Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus 1472 in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Drummond 22 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Lindsay 19. Sie hat um 1487 in Scotland Sir George Douglas Master of Angus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. August 1514 im Alter von 42 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Dunblane Cathedral Churchyard, Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angusが1472年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアカージルで生まれた時，父John Drummondは22歳，母Elizabeth Lindsayは19歳であった。約1487年にスコットランドでSir George Douglas Master of Angusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1514年8月21日に故郷で42歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアダンブランダンブラン カスエドラル チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus(이)가 1472년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 카르길에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Drummond(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Lindsay(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1487년 스컷랜드에서 Sir George Douglas Master of Angus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1514년 8월 21일 그녀의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 던블랜 던블랜 캐테드럴 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus nasceu em 1472, em Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Drummond, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lindsay, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir George Douglas Master of Angus aproximadamente 1487, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de agosto de 1514, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunblane Cathedral Churchyard, Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Dunblane Cathedral Churchyard, Dunblane,: дунблан кэтедраль чурчярд, дунблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus родилась в 1472 г. в местности каргилл, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Drummond было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lindsay, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Douglas Master of Angus около 1487 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 21 августа 1514 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности дунблан кэтедраль чурчярд, дунблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
